overall.description: A static cinematic view from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline across a body of water during twilight. The scene features illuminated skyscrapers with neon signage, gentle water waves, and an overcast sky. A flying vehicle briefly crosses the sky from right to left.

events.description: A flying vehicle enters the frame from the right and travels across the sky above the city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing still on a waterfront promenade, calmly observing the illuminated city skyline across the water

entered.detail: Futuristic cityscape with multiple illuminated high-rise buildings and glowing windows against the twilight sky
Large green neon signage mounted on a building facade on the right side
Dark water with gentle ripples and wave patterns reflecting the city lights
Dark silhouetted mountain range visible on the left horizon behind the city

segments.scene_description: A tranquil static view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, viewed from across a body of water. The skyline features towering glass buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage, while gentle waves lap at the waterfront in the foreground. The overcast sky transitions from deep blue to orange near the horizon, and a flying vehicle briefly traverses the sky above the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a tranquil, static vista of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk as the light shifts across a sprawling urban skyline. It begins with a wide view from across a body of water, where gentle waves lap at the foreground beneath a deep blue overcast sky. As the gaze lingers on the towering glass buildings, the horizon gradually transitions into warm orange tones that illuminate the neon signage and glowing windows of the skyscrapers. The scene then captures a flying vehicle briefly traversing the sky above the city before the view settles back into the quiet atmosphere of the twilight waterfront.
